# cite.me.in

> Monitor your brand's visibility in AI-generated responses. Cite.me.in tracks when and where AI platforms cite your website in their answers. Think of it as Google Search Console, but for LLMs. Squirrel-brain friendly.

## How it works

1. Add your website domain
2. We read your site content and auto-suggest 9 queries across three intent categories: discovery (users who don't know your brand), active search (users looking for what you offer), and comparison (users evaluating options)
3. Queries run once per platform per day with web search enabled — the same experience your potential customers have
4. Every URL that appears in an AI response gets recorded — you see which platforms cite you, how often, and for which queries
5. Brand sentiment is analyzed per platform run (positive, negative, neutral, mixed)

## Supported AI platforms

- Claude (Anthropic)
- ChatGPT (OpenAI)
- Gemini (Google)
- Copilot

All four are queried in parallel for each monitoring run.

## Key metrics

- **All citations** — total URLs cited across all queries (current vs previous week)
- **Your citations** — how many times your domain appears (current vs previous week)
- **Visibility score** — LLM visibility score (current vs previous week)
- **Query coverage rate** — percentage of queries where your domain appears in citations (0-100)

## Features

- Auto-suggested queries based on site content (9 queries across discovery, active search, comparison)
- Custom queries — add, edit, delete, and organize into named groups
- Citation tracking with position data
- Top competitors — see which other domains appear alongside you
- Brand sentiment analysis per platform
- Daily monitoring runs per platform
- Email digests and alerts (Pro)
- Benchmark data — aggregate network comparisons (Pro)
- API access (Pro)
- Bot traffic analytics — see which AI crawlers visit your site
- Visitor traffic from AI platforms

## Pricing

- **Free Trial** — $0 for 25 days, 1 domain, all 4 platforms, monitoring included
- **Pro** — $35/month or $320/year (save $100), up to 5 sites, unlimited daily runs, full citation history, API access, email digests, benchmark data
- **Custom** — unlimited sites, everything in Pro, priority support — for agencies

## API

REST API with Bearer token authentication. Full OpenAPI 3.1 spec at [/docs](/docs).

Endpoints:

- `GET /api/me` — authenticated user details with sites
- `GET /api/user/{id}` — user details by ID (own user only)
- `GET /api/site/{domain}` — site details with users and roles
- `GET /api/site/{domain}/metrics` — citation metrics (current vs previous week)
- `GET /api/site/{domain}/queries` — queries, citations, and sentiment per platform

## Who it's for

- **Solo founders** — know if AI platforms are sending you traffic or ignoring you
- **Small businesses** — find out if ChatGPT and Copilot mention you in their answers
- **Marketing teams** — track AI citation visibility as a channel, see trends, compare platforms
- **Agencies** — monitor multiple client domains from one account

## Open source

Cite.me.in is open source. You can self-host, but running it yourself means managing uptime, updates, and LLM API keys. The hosted version handles all of that plus provides aggregate benchmark data.
